_commentHeader: Supported on Copilot CLI v0.0.422+ and VS Code 1.112 Insiders+.
Personal hooks run in addition to, not instead of, repository-level hooks.

sessionStart.comment: Log every Copilot session start to ~/.copilot/logs/sessions.log so you have a personal audit trail across all repositories.

sessionEnd.comment: Log every Copilot session end to the same personal log file for start/end visibility across repos.

preToolUse.comment: Deny destructive system-level commands such as rm -rf /, format C:, del /f, rd /s /q, mkfs, and similar wipe or reformat patterns.
Use permissionDecision=ask so any git push --force or git push -f requires a human confirmation before history is rewritten.
